visual_description: In a dimly lit, cluttered antique room, three individuals dressed in black stand in a line, each aiming a handgun forward. The central figure, a person with white hair, releases a bright blue magical blast that illuminates the scene and causes the others to recoil in surprise. The camera then cuts to a shocked woman with dark hair shouting, followed by an overhead view of the chaotic aftermath with scattered objects and a figure lying on the floor.
audio_description: A male voice shouts a forceful incantation, accompanied by a bright magical sound. A woman shouts urgently.
